message:
✨ Add EPG refresh service and Add EPG Source dialog (#1)

- Create EpgRefreshService with refreshSource, refreshAllSources, addDefaultSources
- Add database methods: deleteEpgProgrammesForSource, insertEpgProgrammes, updateEpgSourceRefreshTime, deleteEpgSource, getAllChannels
- Create AddEpgSourceDialog with name/URL fields and default sources button
- Wire EPG Sources ListTile in settings to full management screen
- Support gzip-compressed XMLTV feeds via dart:io GZipCodec

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
